org.key_project.util.lookup

Class Lookup

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.lookup.Lookup

  • public class Lookup
extends java.lang.Object
    This class handles the management of services and implementations.

    This class is a flexible alternative for a mediator. You can register and deregister implementation for services. And also you can lookup them up. Multiple implementations are possible; also notification on service change.

    Lookup can be arranged hierarchical, incl. support for notification.

      • inject

        public void inject(java.lang.Object instance)
            throws InjectionException
        Injects all known service implementation in the given instance.

        This method searchs for methods single argument methods, that are annotated with Inject, and calls it with the service implementation.

        Parameters:
        instance - arbitrary non-null method
        Throws:
        InjectionException - is thrown iff a service is unknown but needed for an Inject method.

      • inject

        protected void inject(java.lang.Object instance,
                      java.lang.reflect.Method setter)
               throws InjectionException
        Parameters:

        setter -
        Throws:
        InjectionException
